name: cmux-sessionizer
title: cmux Sessionizer
description: Fuzzy-find git projects and open them as cmux workspaces
author: kyle_kincer

preferences.name: sourceDirectories
preferences.title: Source Directories
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of directories to scan for git projects (e.g. ~/src,~/work)

preferences.name: maxDepth
preferences.title: Max Search Depth
preferences.description: How many directory levels deep to search for git repositories

commands.name: open-project
commands.title: Open Project
commands.subtitle: cmux
commands.description: Find and open a git project as a cmux workspace
